transcription.text: You're out of the house, doing that college thing, coasting through four glorious years. Well, just so your parents don't suspect anything, call them 1-800-COLLECT once in a while. It's the new, cheaper way to call COLLECT. Just dial 1-800-C-O-L-L-E-C-T, and an operator will place your COLLECT call. Now, talking to your parents is cheaper than ever before. The only question is, what do you say? Mommy, I miss you. Excellent. 1-800-COLLECT. Dial it instead of zero the next time you call someone COLLECT.
